ab: oṟ, nel moṟow ka Iwal?
en: A: May I ask if Iwal is at home?

ab: awah matatama’ moṟow ṟik, nel sani ka Iwal.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: oṟ, nel moṟow ka Iwal?
en: A: May I ask if Saun is home?

ab: amol la sikalahan su hiyan? ungat moṟow ka hiya.
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: ima’ su aṟ?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: yutas, kumuy cu, sigawah cu ci a’alu’.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Kumuy, please open the door.

ab: ima’ su aṟ?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Pawan Temu cu, nel cu moh sunlalahaw tikiy sinang.
en: A: Pawan, I am Temu, I have come to play with you.

ab: talagay ta kinbuse’ ini pakakatox la.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: cubay wa! lunlungung misu’ caṟung, patisal ta tikiy hang.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!

ab: tatama’, abu’ ta ci ocya’.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: bahbah su caṟung wa.
en: A: Thank you.

ab: abu’ ci ocya’.
en: B: Please have some tea.

ab: talagay kinramasan abun ka ocya’ su hani.
en: A: Your tea is delicious.

ab: kani’ ta ci pinnahgalan aw?
en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: ho’ ga! talagay kinramasan taxan ka pinnahgalan su aṟ.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: ramas ni’un ka pinnahgalan hani?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: ho’ wa, ramas caṟung ni’un.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: inah haṟi’ moh mani ci kingabenan, masu’ tumahuk ka yaya’ la.
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: ho’, muhala’ cu mema’ ci aba’ hang.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: iya’ kasaṟux kay, aṟat su’ ci’uli’.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: matangi’ cu la, talagay ka kinnane’en mu.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: iya’ kasaṟux, kapayux mani’.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: ho’, ṟamas caṟung ni’un wa.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: maha’ cu la, mamoh cu matox sinang babuw ni luṟi.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: ho’, pasagagiy ta la.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: maha’ cu la, malahngan la.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: awah salahaw babuw ni luṟi kay.
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: kinhayuw maskakiy.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: ho’, awah salahaw moṟow mu i mahnguw su’.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
